activities_projects.title: Meaning of Law
activities_projects.objective: Understand the basic meaning of law
steps: Write the meaning of law in simple words
Give one example of a law
Explain why laws are important for society
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the basic concept of law

activities_projects.title: Workers and Rights
activities_projects.objective: Learn about the rights of workers
steps: Write two rights workers should have
Explain why these rights are important
Discuss your answers in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognises the importance of workers’ rights

activities_projects.title: Examples of Social Justice
activities_projects.objective: Understand the idea of fairness and equality
steps: Write two examples of social justice in daily life
Explain why they are fair
Share your ideas with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the concept of social justice

activities_projects.title: Child Labour Awareness
activities_projects.objective: Understand the issue of child labour
steps: Write what child labour means
Explain why it is harmful
Write how laws help stop child labour

activities_projects.title: Safety Rules at Work
steps: Write two safety rules for workers
Explain why safety is important
Give one example
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognises the importance of workplace safety

activities_projects.title: Short Story on Fair Treatment
activities_projects.objective: Understand the importance of fairness at work
steps: Write a short story about a worker treated unfairly
Explain the problem
Write how the law helped solve it
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the role of law in ensuring fairness

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary from the Chapter
activities_projects.objective: Learn important terms related to law and justice
steps: Write words like law, justice, rights, worker
Write simple meanings
Use one word in a sentence

activities_projects.title: Poster on Workers’ Rights
steps: Draw a poster promoting workers’ rights
Add a slogan such as 'Fair Work for All'
Explain the message of the poster

activities_projects.title: Observe Workplaces Around You
steps: Observe one workplace near your home
Write what work people do there
Write one safety measure you noticed
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Connects textbook ideas with real-life situations

activities_projects.title: Class Discussion on Justice
activities_projects.objective: Encourage thinking about fairness in society
steps: Discuss why laws are needed for fairness
Write two points from the discussion
Write a short summary
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops understanding of justice and equality
